name: vike-ai-gemstack
description: GemStack provider for vike-ai: registers @gemstack/ai-sdk behind the neutral vike-ai port via setAiProvider. The AI twin of @universal-orm/<provider> — app code keeps calling generate()/chat()/stream() on vike-ai; this adapter routes those to the GemStack AI engine (an Agent over claude/gemini/openai/...). The app wires GemStack's own AiRegistry (provider + key); this package is the thin bridge.
